arts.ttl: Why Erik ten Hag received yellow card vs Brentford after Matthijs de Ligt decision
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag was left fuming after Manchester United conceded from a corner when Matthijs de Ligt had to be taken off for treatment

arts.ttl: Why Matthijs de Ligt was forced off the pitch for Brentford goal vs Man United amid complaints
arts.sum: Manchester United news as Matthijs de Ligt forced off against Brentford before Ethan Pinnock goal

arts.ttl: Alex Ferguson absence at Old Trafford explained after leaving Man Utd role
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson was a notable absentee at Old Trafford as Manchester United hosted Brentford in the Premier League. The legendary former manager’s non appearance comes after INEOS dropped him from his role as a club ambassador, which he had held since 2013. The Red Devil’s new part-owners made the decision to end his contract, […] The post Alex Ferguson absence at Old Trafford explained after leaving Man Utd role first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd issue immediate response after Erik ten Hag sack demand during Brentford game
arts.sum: Manchester United fans took to social media to call for Erik ten Hag's head during the first half of their Premier League match with Brentford after watching them fall behind

arts.ttl: Man United defender Matthijs de Ligt suffers bloody head injury against Brentford - who score after he is ordered off the pitch for treatment
arts.sum: Matthijs de Ligt was left with a bloodied head following a clash with Kevin Schade towards the end of the first half in Saturday's game between Manchester United and Brentford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd stars left furious at officials for controversial call before Brentford goal
arts.sum: Manchester United went 1-0 down to Brentford at Old Trafford on Saturday afternoon through Ethan Pinnock's goal but Red Devils players were left furious with a call from the referee ahead of the strike

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans pick sides as Sir Alex Ferguson skips game after brutal Jim Ratcliffe call
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson was not present at Old Trafford for Manchester United's Premier League match against Brentford after news broke that his ambassadorial contract would be stopped

arts.ttl: Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund criticised for injuring team-mate in training: 'That's rubbish'
arts.sum: Incident happened during Denmark training ahead of Euro 2024

arts.ttl: Man United to 'battle with Man City for in-demand manager'... with Red Devils 'keen to be prepared' if they sack Erik Ten Hag
arts.sum: United have endured their worst start to a season after seven games - winning just twice and scoring five goals - which has ramped up the pressure on Ten Hag again.

arts.ttl: "It impacts us" - Ten Hag responds to Man United decision to axe Sir Alex Ferguson
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has spoken out for the first time about the Red Devils' decision to axe Sir Alex Ferguson from his role at the club.
